◎简　　介  

　　Dive into the heart of Van Goah. For the first time, discover in IMAX the fantastic colors and passionate brushwork of a great genius as they take on a new life before our eyes. Relive Vincent's life journey through his letters,see the places that inspired him, and the paintings.
